ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range for the size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range for the size */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range for the size */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length measurement for the size */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category the size belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory" INTEGER /* Inventory level of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Last date the product information was updated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax rate applied to the order */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount code applied to the order */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or special instructions from the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the item (unit price * quantity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the customer logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., USPS, UPS) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "estimated_delivery" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., shipped, out for delivery, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the tax rate applies to */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate as a decimal value */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the tax rate applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "code" TEXT /* Discount code */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the discount as a decimal value */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the discount is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)
